channel.title: Appetizers on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Appetizers on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Summer Pizza
item.description:
Submitted by Danielle Beaudry

Niece of the Bride

2 pkgs Pillsbury Dough Croissant Rolls

Flatten on a cookie sheet and bake at 350 degrees for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown. Let cool.

Topping:

  • ½ cup Miracle Whip
  • ½ cup Hellman’s Mayonnaise
  • 1 pkg Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing (powder)
  • 8 oz cream cheese

Mix together and spread on cooled Croissant crust.

Sprinkle with chopped veggies:

Ingredients

  • 1 cup broccoli
  • 1 cup green pepper
  • ½ cup green onions
  • ½ cup olives
  • 1 cup tomatoes

Instructions

Cover with saran wrap and pat lightly. Best if made the day before.

item.title: Ranch Style Tortilla Roll-Ups
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Darrell Lamothe

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 pkgs Philadelphia cream cheese
  • 1 pkg ranch style dry mix
  • 8 large tortilla shells
  • 1 jar of drained and finely chopped, jalapeno peppers
  • red pimentos, drained and finely chopped
  • onion to your taste, finely chopped
  • black olives, finely chopped, optional

Instructions

Mix cream cheese with dry ranch mix. Spread evenly over tortilla shells. Sparingly top tortillas with the rest of the ingredients.

item.title: Gazpacho
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Joe Albrechtas

Aunt and Uncle of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 large tin tomato juice
  • 1 can diced tomatoesor3-4 ripe, fresh tomatoes, chopped
  • ½ English cucumber, unpeeled and finely chopped
  • ½ red pepper, finely chopped (whole one if small)
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced or crushed
  • ½ red onion, finely chopped
  • 1 tsp sugar
  • ¼ cup red wine vinegar
  • approximately 2 tbsp good olive oil
  • dashes of Tabasco to taste
  • salt and pepper to taste

Instructions

Best refrigerated for a couple of hours or overnight. Serve cold, garnished with croutons.

item.title: Crab Finger Puffs
item.description:
Submitted by Nancy and Mike Potvin

Cousins of the Groom

  • 8 oz light cream cheese, softened
  • 2 tbsp grated onion
  • 4.2 oz canned crab meat, drained and cartilage removed
  • 2 tbsp fine bread crumbs
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/16 tsp garlic powder
  • 1 lb. pkg wonton wrappers
  • cooking oil for deep frying

Mash cream cheese in a bowl. Work in onion, crab meat, bread crumbs, salt and garlic powder.

Place 1 tsp of mixture in center of each wonton wrapper. Dampen edges of wonton with water. Fold one corner at a time to centre, pressing to seal well. Cover with damp towel until ready to cook.

item.title: Cache Bay Chicken and Spinach Roll-Ups
item.description:
Submitted by Lorraine and Frank Nault

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 2 cloves garlic, finely chopped
  • 1 cup spinach, chopped
  • 1/4 cup Dijon mustard
  • 1/2 cup yogurt
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp black pepper
  • 1/4 cup lemon juice
  • 4 large boneless, skinless chicken breasts
  • 6 slices Swiss Cheese
  • 4 thin slices smoked turkey breast
  • 4 slices lemon (optional)

Instructions

In a bowl combine garlic, spinach, mustard, yogurt, salt, half the pepper and 1 tsp of lemon juice. Gently pound the chicken breasts flat between sheets of plastic wrap. Spread the sauce on the chicken. Top each breast with a slice each of the Swiss cheese and smoked turkey. Cut remaining slices of cheese in half and set aside.

item.title: Spinach Bread Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 10-oz pkg spinach
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 1 cup sour cream
  • 1 pkg dry Knorr vegetable soup mix
  • 2 green onions
  • 1 small can water chestnuts

Instructions

Cook spinach just lightly; drain and chop. Chop onions and water chestnuts. Mix all ingredients together and serve with small pieces of bread.

NOTE: You can use a large round load of pumpernickel bread. Cut bread from the center and use this to serve your dip. The bread taken from the center is used as small pieces to dip.

item.title: Shrimp Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup (250 gr) sour cream
  • 4 oz cream cheese, softened
  • 1 tsp onion salt
  • 1 tsp horseradish
  • ½ tsp Worcestershire sauce
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • 1 tbsp ketchup
  • 4 oz shrimp, chopped

Instructions

Combine and mix all ingredients except shrimp until blended. Add shrimp. Refrigerate. Serve with crackers and/or sliced vegetables.

item.title: Salsa Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml sour cream
  • 440 gram jar salsa
  • shredded medium cheese
  • chopped fresh tomatoes
  • chopped mild onions
  • chopped lettuce

Instructions

Layer cheese/sour cream/salsa mix, chopped tomatoes, chopped onions and chopped lettuce. Top with more grated cheese.

Makes 2 12”round dishes. (My low green Pyrex dish) (BB - Left this in because it made me laugh. I’m guessing we don’t have that “low green Pyrex dish” anymore?)

item.title: Salmon Cheese Ball
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 pkg (8 oz) cream cheese, softened
  • 1 tin (7-1/2 oz) salmon, drained & flaked
  • 1 tsp Worcestershire sauce
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper
  • Snipped parsley
  • Snack crackers

Instructions

Mix cream cheese, salmon, Worcestershire sauce, salt and pepper until well blended, about 1 minute. Shape into a ball. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.

Sprinkle with parsley. Garnish with sliced olives if desired. Serve with crackers.

Option:- Substitute 1 tin (6-1/2 oz) tuna, drained & flaked, for the salmon.

item.title: Salmon Pate
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 (16 oz ) tin red salmon
  • ¼ or ½ lb butter
  • ¼ tsp dill weed (or 1 tsp fresh)
  • 2 Tbsp Miracle Whip
  • Salt & pepper to taste

Instructions

Blend for a few minutes, then chill.

item.title: Pumpernickel Spinach Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Pumpernickel
  • 1 300 gr pkg of Chopped Spinach
  • 1 40-gr Knorr Vegetable Soup Mix
  • 1 500 mL tub of Sour Cream

Instructions

Defrost chopped spinach & squeeze out excess water.

Hollow out center of pumpernickel.

Cut center of pumpernickel into cubes or slices. In a small bowl combine sour cream soup mix and spinach.

Stir until thoroughly mixed. Place in center of pumpernickel

Refrigerate for 1 hour

Include bagels as an option for dipping.

item.title: Pickled Wieners
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb 5” wieners (12 to a pound) OR equivalent in smoked or Polish sausage or pepperoni or knockwurst
  • 1-1/4 cups white vinegar
  • ½ cup water
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 2 tsp pickling spices
  • 1 garlic clove, chopped

Instructions

Cut wieners in thirds crosswise. If other smoked type sausages are used, cut them into large bite-sized pieces. Measure all remaining ingredients into shallow saucepan, bring to a boil, add cut wieners, reduce heat, cover and SIMMER gently 30 minutes. Remove from heat and pour into preheated, broad-mouthed jar with lid. Cool then refrigerate for 3 or 4 days before using. During the marinating period, shake jar to make sure all wiener pieces are covered with marinade.

item.title: Oxo Honey Garlic Chicken Wings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs chicken wings
  • 1/3 cup honey
  • 2 tbsp Oxo chicken bouillon liquid
  • 2 tbsp soya sauce
  • 1 tbsp lemon juice
  • ½ tsp garlic powder
  • ¼ tsp ground ginger

Instructions

Cut wings in two sections and remove tips. In a large baking pan, place wings in a single layer. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 minutes. Remove from oven and raise temperature to 475 degrees. Drain fat from pan.

item.title: Nutty Cheese Ball
item.description:
Ingredients

  • ½ lb grated med. Cheddar Cheese (about 2 cups)
  • ½ cup milk
  • 1 tsp Worcestershire sauce
  • 8 oz softened cream cheese
  • ½ tsp garlic salt
  • 3 oz crumbled blue cheese
  • ¾ cup finely chopped walnuts

Instructions

Mix in a 2-quart bowl, cheeses, milk, Worcestershire sauce and garlic salt. Chill if necessary before shaping into a ball. Roll in walnuts. Chill until firm (about 3 – 5 hours). Serve with crackers.

item.title: Loney's Express Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups sour cream (500 ml)
  • 1 pouch Loney’s Onion Soup Mix
  • 2 Tbsp green pepper, finely chopped
  • ½ tsp Tabasco spicy sauce
  • 2 tsp tomato ketchup
  • ½ tsp chili powder

Instructions

In a medium-sized bowl mix Loney’s Onion Soup Mix with sour cream. Add remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly. Serve immediately with an assortment of raw vegetables.

For a Mexican-style dip, use twice the amount of spicy sauce. Serve with tortilla chips.

item.title: Hidden Valley Bacon & Cheddar Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 (1-oz) packet Original Ranch Party Dip
  • 1 pint sour cream
  • 1/4 cup bacon bits
  • 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese

Instructions

Mix Ranch Party Dip with sour cream.

Add bacon bits and shredded cheddar cheese.

Mix and serve.

item.title: Exquisite Crab Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 8-oz pkg cream cheese
  • 1 can (6 oz) crabmeat
  • 1 tsp horseradish
  • 1 tsp milk
  • 1 tsp minced onion

Instructions

Combine all ingredients. Serve cold or bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees. Serve with cocktail rye bread.

item.title: Crispy Chicken Wings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs chicken wings
  • ½ cup melted butter or margarine
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • 2 tbsp chopped parsley
  • 1 cup dry bread crumbs
  • ½ cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • ½ tsp salt

Instructions

Cut chicken wings in two pieces, discarding the tips. In a small shallow bowl, combine butter and garlic powder. In another bowl, combine remaining ingredients. Dip chicken into butter mixture, then into crumb mixture. Place on greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 – 60 minutes or until done.

item.title: Corey's Cheese Ball
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 250 gr pkg cream cheese
  • ½ jar Cheez Whiz cheese
  • 1 cup shredded cheese
  • 1-1/2 tsp onion flakes
  • 1-1/2 tsp Worcestershire sauce

Instructions

Mix well. Refrigerate till firm. Makes 2 balls. Roll in parsley flakes or crushed walnuts.

item.title: Colette's Crab Meat Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 7-oz tin crab meat
  • 1 pkg. (250 gr) cream cheese
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • Sprinkling of parsley

Instructions

Mix all ingredients. Seafood sauce on top for flavor and color (optional)

item.title: Colette's Spinach Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup sour cream
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 1 pkg frozen chopped spinach
  • 1 pkg Knorr vegetable soup mix

Instructions

Drain spinach well, then mix all ingredients together. If desired, put dip into pumpernickel bread.

item.title: Chestnut & Bacon Roll-ups
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Quantity desired of bacon strips
  • Quantity desired of water chestnuts
  • Sugar
  • Soya Sauce

Instructions

In one bowl place granulated sugar and in second bowl place soya sauce. Dip chestnuts firs in soya sauce and then into the sugar coat.

Partly cook bacon to remove some of the grease but bacon is still limp. Roll prepared chestnuts in bacon and secure with a toothpick.

Place on a cookie sheet. Just before serving, place in oven or under broiler to crisp bacon.

item.title: Cheese Krispies
item.description:
This recipe came from Pat Johnston, who is Yolande’s Friend

Ingredients

  • 1 cup Butter or Margarine
  • 1 Pkg (1/2 lb.) Imperial Cheese (Red)
  • Dash Cayenne Pepper
  • Pinch of salt
  • ½ tsp Worcestershire Sauce
  • 1-1/2 cups Flour
  • 4 cups Rice Krispies

Instructions

Combine all ingredients by hand or with a pastry blender. Form into small balls. Place on cookie sheet and flatten with fork. Bake 15 – 20 minutes at 350 degrees.

item.title: Bruschetta Fast and Easy
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 28-oz or 796 ml can diced tomatoes
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 1 Tbsp dried basil
  • 2 Tbsp olive oil
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • 1 loaf French bread
  • 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese

Instructions

COMBINE tomatoes, onion and basil in large skillet. BRING to boil, simmer, uncovered, over medium heat until thickened – about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.

COMBINE oil and garlic powder. SLICE bread in half lengthwise, place cut side up on large baking sheet. PLACE under broiler to toast bread. BRUSH bread with garlic oil. SPREAD tomato mixture evenly over bread; sprinkle with cheese (optional). PLACE under broiler until cheese melts, about 2 minutes.

item.title: Antipasto Roll-ups
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 7 oz tuna or chicken, drained and flakes
  • 1 hard-boiled egg, chopped
  • ¼ cup mayonnaise
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • 2 6-oz pkg sliced mozzarella cheese
  • 2 8-oz pkg sliced party salami

Instructions

Mash together tuna or chicken, egg, mayo and lemon juice; set aside.

Cut each cheese slice into 4. Arrange a piece of cheese on each slice of salami, trim cheese to fit.

Spread a tsp. of tuna or chicken mixture on cheese. Roll up and secure with 3 wooden picks. Chill. To serve, cut each roll in 3. Makes 8 dozen appetizers.
